6. PERMITS: Contractor will obtain all required permits unless otherwise specified. Permit fees are included in proposal unless noted.

7. DISPUTE RESOLUTION: Any disputes arising under this agreement shall be resolved by binding arbitration in accordance with applicable law.

8. GOVERNING LAW: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the state in which work is performed.
